---
title: "PUMA Smoke Test"
author: "PUMA Project Contributors"
format: pdf
---

# Introduction

This is a smoke test for the Quarto rendering pipeline in puma-info.
The PUMA Project benchmarks local language models on ICT project
management tasks. Energy is given by $E = mc^2$, of course.

# Method

Quarto compiles this `.qmd` file through Pandoc to LaTeX, then
through TinyTeX to PDF, deterministically.

# Result

If you can read this in `output/test.pdf`, the toolchain works.
